notes: Preferred Codex import path. Creates per-session Work Records and imports messages, tool-call previews, command-output previews, reasoning summaries, lifecycle notices, and parent-child session edges when Codex records them.
Legacy fallback import is prompt-log only.
Fixture path proves normalized session, event, cursor, and edge import.

providers.auth_detection: Presence-only detection under ~/.codex; do not read or print secrets.
hook_options: Future native hook/wrapper work should emit normalized provider envelopes.
redaction_notes: Secret-shaped metadata and payload content are sanitized before persistence.
Full raw tool arguments, complete stdout/stderr, encrypted reasoning, bootstrap context, and binary/image artifacts remain raw-only unless a bounded safe preview is available.
Cursor/source metadata are retained for idempotent replay.
blockers: Codex session import does not expand full raw tool arguments, complete stdout/stderr, encrypted reasoning content, bootstrap context, binary/image artifacts, or file-change details unless a safe bounded preview is present.
Legacy prompt-history import does not include assistant replies, tool output, command output, or child-session relationships.
providers.public_docs: Codex supports session JSONL import, legacy prompt-history import, and normalized fixture replay; live passive capture is not yet implemented.
